name: okpack-ai-research-feed-fetch
prompt: okpack-ai-research feed pull: fetch the AI-research OPML into raw/ai/ for the ingest lane. Pure script, wakeAgent=false.

name: okpack-ai-research-hf-import
prompt: Seed notable model pages from the Hugging Face hub (bounded top-N by likes). Pure script, wakeAgent=false, ZERO LLM tokens.

name: okpack-ai-research-hf-papers-import
prompt: Seed source/paper pages from Hugging Face Daily Papers (bounded, upvote-curated). Pure script, wakeAgent=false, ZERO LLM tokens.

name: okpack-ai-research-weekly-brief
prompt: Weekly AI-research brief. Your FIRST response MUST be a tool call: file_read on wiki/HOT.md (the derived load-first set: recent sources, recently-updated entities, open predictions). Then write the brief via mcp_okengine_write_create_entity (the enforced write path — never file_write) to path "briefings/<YYYY-MM-DD>.md" (frontmatter: type: briefing, title, published: <YYYY-MM-DD>, updated: <YYYY-MM-DD> — use TODAY's actual date, not a guessed or future one, for the filename and both date fields) covering the 4-6 most significant developments of the week — new models/capabilities, notable papers/techniques, benchmark movements, credible release signals — each 2-3 sentences with [[wikilinks]] to the entities + their source. Note any open prediction that moved. Practitioner-grade and terse; skip 101 explanation. LOCAL-ONLY: do not use web tools.
